prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Event announcement (イベント案内)
【Industry】: Insurance (保険業)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: main_purpose, main_purpose, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=C, Question 3=D

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Event coordinator",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good morning, everyone. We are pleased to invite you to our annual insurance seminar this Friday at the Grand Hotel conference room. This event will start at 10 AM and will feature discussions on the latest trends in the insurance industry. Key speakers from top insurance companies will share their insights and strategies. Attendees will have the opportunity to participate in Q&A sessions and network with industry professionals. Please register by Wednesday to secure your spot. We look forward to seeing you there and hope you gain valuable knowledge and connections.",
    "topic": "Annual insurance seminar announcement"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To introduce new insurance products",
        "To sell insurance policies",
        "To announce a change in venue",
        "To invite people to an insurance seminar"
      ],
      "correct": "To invite people to an insurance seminar",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチは保険セミナーへの招待が主目的であると明確に示しています。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the event?",
      "options": [
        "To entertain guests",
        "To recruit new employees",
        "To discuss industry trends",
        "To provide health screenings"
      ],
      "correct": "To discuss industry trends",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、イベントが保険業界のトレンドを議論することを目的としていると述べています。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What can be inferred about the event?",
      "options": [
        "It will be held outdoors.",
        "It is open to the general public.",
        "It is a free event.",
        "It requires prior registration."
      ],
      "correct": "It requires prior registration.",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは参加には水曜日までの登録が必要であると述べています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: event_announcement
Industry: insurance
Speaker Role: Event coordinator
Topic: Annual insurance seminar announcement

Speech Text:
Good morning, everyone. We are pleased to invite you to our annual insurance seminar this Friday at the Grand Hotel conference room. This event will start at 10 AM and will feature discussions on the latest trends in the insurance industry. Key speakers from top insurance companies will share their insights and strategies. Attendees will have the opportunity to participate in Q&A sessions and network with industry professionals. Please register by Wednesday to secure your spot. We look forward to seeing you there and hope you gain valuable knowledge and connections.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4の問題と選択肢を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 問題文は明確で分かりやすい日本語に
- 選択肢も正確に翻訳
- TOEIC問題の慣例に従った表現を使用

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 questions and options to Japanese:

Question 1: What is the main purpose of the announcement?
Options:
A: To introduce new insurance products
B: To sell insurance policies
C: To announce a change in venue
D: To invite people to an insurance seminar

Question 2: What is the main purpose of the event?
Options:
A: To entertain guests
B: To recruit new employees
C: To discuss industry trends
D: To provide health screenings

Question 3: What can be inferred about the event?
Options:
A: It will be held outdoors.
B: It is open to the general public.
C: It is a free event.
D: It requires prior registration.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "questionsTranslations": [
    {
      "questionTranslation": "問題1の日本語訳",
      "optionTranslations": ["選択肢Aの日本語訳", "選択肢Bの日本語訳", "選択肢Cの日本語訳", "選択肢Dの日本語訳"]
    },
    // 同様に3問分
  ]
}
